pi_items.source: task description and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce this exact report name
task description and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce this exact dashboard name
task description and verifier.py logic require searching the security_logs index, which is created and populated with SSH logs in setup_splunk.sh
task description asks for 'at least two panels' and verifier.py checks target_dash.get('panel_count', 0) >= 2
install_splunk.sh configures user-seed.conf with USERNAME = admin, and setup_splunk.sh uses this for all auth commands
install_splunk.sh configures user-seed.conf with PASSWORD = SplunkAdmin1!, and setup_splunk.sh uses this for all auth commands

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the real-world log data is downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub, and confirming the target report name 'Subnet_Attack_Aggregation', dashboard name 'Distributed_Brute_Force_Monitoring', expected index 'security_logs', minimum panels (2), and Splunk credentials explicitly match the task description, verifier scripts, and environment setup scripts.
